submitted_payload.name: Ralph Workflow
submitted_payload.shortDescription: Free open-source AI coding workflow system for unattended plan-build-verify loops.
submitted_payload.longDescription: Ralph Workflow is the operating system for autonomous coding: a free and open-source composable loop framework and AI orchestrator for developers and technical teams doing ambitious software work. It keeps a simple core loop, then composes planning, implementation, and verification into a structured workflow so you come back to something reviewable instead of just an agent saying done. Codeberg is the primary repo; GitHub is the mirror: https://github.com/Ralph-Workflow/Ralph-Workflow

why_this_action: Primary Codeberg adoption is still flat, so a fresh developer-facing directory with a working public API is higher leverage than another internal-only draft.
ListYourTool.com was not present in outreach-log.md, so this expands distribution instead of duplicating an in-flight lane.
The submission endpoint accepted a direct POST from this runtime without login or CAPTCHA and returned a concrete pending tool id.
The listing points evaluators to Codeberg first and preserves GitHub as the mirror only.
expected_outcome: Qualified developers discover Ralph Workflow through a new directory listing that points directly to the Codeberg primary repo.
replacement_condition: If there is no live ListYourTool.com listing or referral evidence by 2026-06-06, treat this as pending only and shift the next fresh-action slot to another untouched developer-facing directory with an executable public submit path.
